channel.title: Engineer on Coding notes - and snippets
channel.description: Recent content in Engineer on Coding notes - and snippets

item.title: Principal Engineer operating principles
item.description: Principal Engineer operating principles Staff/Principal Engineer Operating Principles: Product Strategy, Roadmaps, and Team Impact 1. Product Strategy (engineering influence) Key idea: connect product goals with platform capabilities Core points: start from product goals identify technical constraints and opportunities propose platform capabilities that unlock features ensure the system can evolve with the product Key words: product goals, platform capabilities, future evolution, technical constraints, enabling product 2. Roadmap Definition & Prioritization Key idea: balance product value with engineering leverage
